title: 10 best herbal teas for phlegm
intro_desc: Herbal teas for phlegm are natural remedies that help alleviate excessive mucus production and congestion in the body. They work by loosening and clearing out phlegm, providing relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The best herbal teas for phlegm include Glycyrrhiza glabra, Eucalyptus globulus, Echinacea purpurea, Thymus vulgaris, Zingiber officinale, Rosmarinus officinalis, Lavandula angustifolia, Piper nigrum, Salvia officinalis, and Sambucus nigra. If left untreated, phlegm can lead to chronic coughs, fatigue, and breathing difficulties, severely impacting daily life and overall well-being.
